releases.author: tzamtzis
releases.description:
# 🎉 Audio Transcription Plugin v1.0.0 - Initial Public Release

Transform your audio recordings into structured, actionable notes automatically. This plugin transcribes audio files
(m4a, mp3) and extracts key points, action items, and follow-ups using AI - all within your Obsidian vault.

## ✨ Features

- **Automatic Transcription**: Convert meeting recordings, lectures, and interviews into text
- **Multilingual Support**: Full support for Greek and English with automatic language detection
- **AI-Powered Analysis**: Extract summaries, key points, action items, and follow-up questions
- **Multiple Processing Modes**:
  - **Local Processing**: Privacy-focused offline transcription using Whisper.cpp (no internet needed)
  - **Cloud Processing**: Faster transcription via OpenAI Whisper API
  - **Custom Models**: Use OpenRouter for alternative AI models
- **Speaker Identification**: Distinguish between different speakers in conversations
- **Long Audio Support**: Handle recordings up to 2+ hours
- **Customizable Analysis**: Add your own custom instructions for personalized results
- **Automatic Model Management**: Download and cache AI models with progress tracking
- **Timestamp Support**: Include timestamps in transcripts for easy navigation
- **Recent Transcriptions**: Track and quickly access your recent transcription history

## 📦 Installation

### Manual Installation (for now)

1. Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` from this release
2. Create a folder in your Obsidian vault: `.obsidian/plugins/audio-transcription/`
3. Copy both files into that folder
4. Restart Obsidian
5. Go to Settings → Community Plugins
6. Enable "Audio Transcription"

### From Community Plugins (Coming Soon)

Once approved by Obsidian, you'll be able to install directly from the Community Plugins browser.

## 🚀 Quick Start

1. Click the microphone icon in the ribbon (left sidebar)
2. Choose your audio file (m4a or mp3)
3. Configure transcription settings (or use defaults)
4. Click "Start Transcription"
5. Find your transcribed markdown file in your vault!

## 📋 Requirements

- **Obsidian**: Version 1.4.0 or higher
- **Desktop Only**: Windows (macOS and Linux support coming soon)
- **For Local Processing**: ~500MB-2GB disk space for AI models
- **For Cloud Processing**: OpenAI or OpenRouter API key

## 🔧 Configuration

The plugin supports both local and cloud processing:

- **Local mode**: Downloads Whisper models (tiny/small/medium/large) and processes entirely offline
- **Cloud mode**: Uses OpenAI Whisper API for faster processing (requires API key)
- **OpenRouter mode**: Use alternative AI models through OpenRouter service

## 📸 Screenshots

![Settings Panel](https://github.com/tzamtzis/obsidian-transcription-plugin/blob/main/screenshots/settings-1.png?raw=true)

![Transcription Modal](https://github.com/tzamtzis/obsidian-transcription-plugin/blob/main/screenshots/start-transcription.png?raw=true)

![Sample Output](https://github.com/tzamtzis/obsidian-transcription-plugin/blob/main/screenshots/sample-output-gr.png?raw=true)

## 🐛 Known Limitations

- Currently Windows only (macOS and Linux support planned)
- Local processing requires significant disk space for models
- Very long audio files (3+ hours) may require patience

## 📝 Changelog

See the full [README](https://github.com/tzamtzis/obsidian-transcription-plugin#readme) for detailed documentation.

## 🤝 Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit issues, feature requests, or pull requests.

## 📄 License

MIT License - Free to use, modify, and distribute.

## ☕ Support

If you find this plugin useful, consider [buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/tzam)!

---

**Made with ♥ for the Obsidian community**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tzamtzis/obsidian-transcription-plugin/commits/1.0.0
